NVDA.title: NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA Shares Sold by Codex Capital Asset Management L.L.C.
NVDA.summary: Codex Capital Asset Management L.L.C. reduced its stake in NVIDIA Corporation by 8.8% in Q4, selling 22,000 shares, though NVIDIA remains its largest holding at 15.5% of its portfolio. This reduction comes despite NVIDIA reporting a strong quarter with EPS and revenue beating estimates, an authorized $80 billion share buyback, and an increased quarterly dividend. Analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating for NVIDIA, citing strong AI demand and its central role in the cloud buildout, even as some express concerns about rising competition and potential overheating of AI stocks.

NVDA.title: Equinix, Inc. (EQIX.US) Launches 6th AI Data Center in HK
NVDA.summary: Digital infrastructure company Equinix, Inc. (EQIX.US) has launched its sixth International Business Exchange (IBX) data center, HK6, in Hong Kong. This new facility is designed to support AI innovation with liquid cooling and high power density, representing an initial investment of USD124 million. HK6 will eventually offer up to 3,550 cabinets and connects to the Hong Kong-Shenzhen Innovation and Technology Park, fostering cross-border collaboration and housing the AI Discovery Hub in partnership with Hewlett Packard Enterprise and NVIDIA.

NVDA.title: Equinix, Inc. (EQIX.US) Launches 6th AI Data Center in HK
NVDA.summary: Digital infrastructure company Equinix, Inc. (EQIX.US) has launched its sixth International Business Exchange (IBX) data center, HK6, in Hong Kong. This new facility is specifically designed to support AI innovation with a liquid cooling system, a initial investment of USD124 million, and a capacity for 1,000 cabinets that will expand to 3,550 upon full completion. HK6 also hosts the AI Discovery Hub, a joint initiative with Hewlett Packard Enterprise and NVIDIA, aiming to foster cross-border collaboration and accelerate AI research and development in the Greater Bay Area.

NVDA.title: Ambarella VP sells $660,943 in shares; prices from $67.06 to $67.07
NVDA.summary: Ambarella Inc.'s (NASDAQ:AMBA) VP of Business Development, Chen Yun-Lung, sold 9,856 ordinary shares worth $660,943 on June 12, 2026, at prices ranging from $67.06 to $67.07 per share. This transaction leaves him with 66,515 shares, occurring while the stock trades above its Fair Value according to InvestingPro. The company has recent positive news including exceeding Q1 earnings estimates, maintaining revenue guidance, and securing a major AI SoC agreement, leading to analyst rating reiterations and price target increases, despite some concerns about supply chain risks.

NVDA.title: Why FTAI Aviation (FTAI) Is Up 14.8% After Redeeming Costly Preferreds And Securitizing Engines
NVDA.summary: FTAI Aviation's stock rose 14.8% following strategic financial moves, including the redemption of high-yield 8.25% Series C preferred shares and a substantial US$612 million asset-backed securitization. These actions aim to strengthen its balance sheet and support new growth areas like AI power turbines and extended engine service life due to potential geopolitical developments. The company's future narrative projects significant revenue and earnings growth, alongside a fair value of $350.60, representing a 31% upside.

NVDA.title: United Microelectronics Corp (UMC) Earnings Forecast: Future EPS & Revenue Growth Estimates
NVDA.summary: This article provides an earnings forecast for United Microelectronics Corp (UMC), detailing its current earnings forecast score, average price target, and analyst ratings. It also includes peer comparisons and answers frequently asked questions about expected revenue, price targets, and past EPS performance. The data indicates a "Sell" trend according to analyst consensus.

NVDA.title: Coherent Corp pours $650M into Texas photonics facility as NVIDIA deepens AI optics partnership
NVDA.summary: Coherent Corp is investing $650 million to expand its photonics facility in Sherman, Texas, quadrupling wafer production capacity and creating roughly 1,000 jobs. This expansion is a direct result of a multi-year strategic agreement with NVIDIA, which includes a $2 billion investment to advance optics for next-generation AI infrastructure. The project is also supported by up to $50 million in CHIPS Act funding, highlighting the critical role of optical interconnect technology in the future of AI.

NVDA.title: Intuitive Surgical Draws Big Citadel Bet as Ken Griffin Trims Nvidia, Amazon Stakes
NVDA.summary: Ken Griffin's Citadel Advisors has made a significant contrarian investment in Intuitive Surgical Inc. (ISRG), increasing its stake by 30.3% in the first quarter, while simultaneously trimming positions in Nvidia Corp. and Amazon.com Inc. This move suggests a shift away from high-valued AI stocks towards opportunities with more attractive risk-reward profiles. Citadel views Intuitive Surgical's recent 20% stock decline as an overreaction to temporary challenges, believing the company's strong market moat and long-term growth potential remain intact despite increased competition and temporary margin pressures.

MSFT.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. $AMD Shares Sold by Delaney Dennis R
MSFT.summary: Delaney Dennis R reduced its stake in Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) by 11.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 3,183 shares. Despite this, Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus for AMD, with an average target price of $428.65, and the company reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue estimates. AMD's stock has seen positive movement from its AI initiatives and acquisition activities, though some analysts warn of high valuation after recent rallies.

MSFT.title: &PARTNERS Increases Position in Salesforce Inc. $CRM
MSFT.summary: &PARTNERS significantly increased its holdings in Salesforce Inc. (NYSE:CRM) by 73.6% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total stake to 145,232 shares worth $38.48 million. Other institutional investors also modified their positions, with hedge funds and institutional investors collectively owning 80.43% of the company's stock. Salesforce recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.44 per share and a $25 billion stock buyback program, while analyst ratings suggest a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a price target of $259.26.

MSFT.title: TCS, Coforge, Infosys Gain As Nifty IT Extends Rally Amid US-Iran Peace Deal Driven Risk-On Mood
MSFT.summary: The Nifty IT index extended its rally for the third consecutive session, rising 1.31%, with all nine constituent stocks posting gains. This uptrend was driven by a risk-on sentiment following the US-Iran peace deal, which boosted technology stocks globally and in India. Coforge Ltd. led the gains, and the index added over Rs. 26,159 crore in market capitalization.

MSFT.title: Glimpse Group Inc (VRAR) Earnings Forecast: Future EPS & Revenue Growth Estimates
MSFT.summary: The Glimpse Group Inc (VRAR) has an earnings forecast score of 8.00, ranking 108 out of 480 in its industry. Analysts have set an average price target of $2.62, with a unanimous "Buy" rating based on one analyst's assessment, indicating a significant upside potential of +394.34%. The company's expected revenue for the next quarter is $3.00M, and EPS is forecasted at -$0.01, an improvement from the previous quarter's -$0.05.

MSFT.title: Silver Lake Technology Investors V sells $139,073 of Dell Technologies stock By Investing.com
MSFT.summary: Silver Lake Technology Investors V, an affiliate of Silver Lake, sold 345 shares of Dell Technologies (NASDAQ:DELL) Class C Common Stock totaling approximately $139,073 on June 12, 2026. This transaction followed the conversion of Class B shares to Class C shares. Dell's stock has seen a significant surge of about 254% over the past year and is currently considered overvalued according to InvestingPro analysis.

MSFT.title: Silver Lake Technology Investors V sells $139,073 of Dell Technologies stock By Investing.com
MSFT.summary: Silver Lake Technology Investors V, L.P., an affiliate of Silver Lake, sold 345 shares of Dell Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:DELL) Class C Common Stock for approximately $139,073 on June 12, 2026. This sale follows a significant 254% surge in DELL's stock over the past year. The transactions involved the conversion of Class B shares to Class C shares, and despite the sale, Silver Lake entities and Egon Durban retain substantial holdings in Dell.

MSFT.title: Kyivstar Expands Satellite Connectivity with Starlink Mobile Light Data Service
MSFT.summary: Kyivstar, Ukraine's leading digital operator, has launched Starlink Mobile light data service nationwide, allowing 4G (LTE) smartphone users to access essential apps like Viber, WhatsApp, and Google Maps via Starlink satellites when terrestrial network coverage is unavailable. This initiative significantly enhances communication capabilities and access to critical services, especially during outages and in remote areas, further building robust and resilient connectivity across Ukraine. The service is currently available for Android users, with plans to expand to other devices and applications.

MSFT.title: Digimarc extends AI security tools to major enterprise platforms By Investing.com
MSFT.summary: Digimarc Corporation announced the integration of its AI security tools with major enterprise platforms like LangChain, ServiceNow, Salesforce, Google Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot Studio. This allows AI agents on these platforms to cryptographically stamp outputs, verify authenticity, and retrieve lineage records for audit and compliance. Despite its stock surging 73% year-to-date, the company faces financial headwinds, including a 15% revenue decline over the last year.

GOOGL.title: HSBC expects over $100m gains from using Google AI tools
GOOGL.summary: HSBC is partnering with Google Cloud to integrate artificial intelligence across its global operations, anticipating over $100 million in additional revenue or savings from various projects. The bank plans to deploy more than 200 new AI use cases in the next two years, leveraging Google's advanced AI capabilities, including Gemini models. This move positions HSBC as one of the first global banks to outline a clear strategy for leveraging AI to boost efficiency and revenue, amidst industry discussions about AI's impact on employment.

GOOGL.title: Fubotv Inc (FUBO) Earnings Forecast: Future EPS & Revenue Growth Estimates
GOOGL.summary: Fubotv Inc (FUBO) has an earnings forecast score of 8.00 and an average price target of $4.25 from 10 analysts, with most recommending a "Buy." The company's expected revenue for the next quarter is $1.58 billion, and its EPS for the previous quarter was -$0.21, with a forecast of -$0.31 for the next.

GOOGL.title: FTCS ETF Holdings List — TRADEGATE:FTCS
GOOGL.summary: This article provides the current holdings list for the Franklin S&P 500 Communication Services UCITS ETF AccumUSD (FTCS) on Tradegate Exchange, as of June 12, 2026. Key holdings include Meta Platforms, Alphabet (Class A and C), Netflix, and Verizon, detailing their weight, share count, and market value. The fund offers exposure to major communication services companies.

GOOGL.title: Hp CCO David McQuarrie sells $259,732 in company stock
GOOGL.summary: HP Inc.'s Chief Commercial Officer, David P. McQuarrie, sold 10,524 shares of company stock for a total of $259,732 on June 12, 2026. Despite the sale, which was executed via a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, InvestingPro analysis suggests HPQ stock is undervalued. The company recently reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations, and announced a new limited-edition AI PC in collaboration with Scuderia Ferrari.

GOOGL.title: Jefferies (NYSE: JEF) offers $500K autocallable notes tied to GOOGL stock
GOOGL.summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. is offering $500,000 in Senior Autocallable Contingent Coupon Barrier Notes linked to Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) Class A common stock. These notes pay a monthly contingent coupon of $10.83 if GOOGL's stock meets the Coupon Barrier, are autocallable after approximately three years, and expose investors to 1-to-1 downside risk at maturity if GOOGL's price falls below a specified Threshold Value. All payments are subject to Jefferies' credit risk, and the estimated value per note is $983.10.

GOOGL.title: Here’s Why Apple Inc (AAPL) Is Falling Despite AI Advancements at WWDC 2026
GOOGL.summary: Apple Inc. (AAPL) shares have fallen despite significant AI announcements at WWDC 2026, as investor sentiment indicates that the company did not meet AI advancement expectations. However, analysts from Maxim and Bernstein SocGen reiterated Buy/Outperform ratings and raised price targets, highlighting progress in enhanced Siri and collaboration with Google's Gemini technology for Apple Intelligence.

GOOGL.title: Here’s Why Apple Inc (AAPL) Is Falling Despite AI Advancements at WWDC 2026
GOOGL.summary: Despite significant AI advancements announced at WWDC 2026, shares of Apple Inc (AAPL) have fallen due to investors' unmet expectations regarding the company's AI progress. However, market analysts view the event as a meaningful first step, with firms like Maxim and Bernstein SocGen reiterating "Buy" and "Outperform" ratings, respectively, and increasing price targets based on upcoming Siri enhancements and the collaboration with Google's Gemini technology for Apple Intelligence. The article also notes that while Apple has potential, some AI stocks offer greater upside.

GOOGL.title: Applovin Corp Stock (APP) Moved Down by 4.40% on Jun 16: What Investors Need To Know
GOOGL.summary: Applovin Corp (APP) stock fell by 4.40% on June 16, influenced by broad weakness in the technology sector, significant share liquidations by corporate executives, and rising competitive and valuation concerns. Despite strong operational fundamentals and positive analyst growth expectations, the company faces "SaaS-pocalypse" pressures, insider selling impacting investor sentiment, and increased scrutiny over its AI-driven advertising platform amidst new open-source competition and data privacy regulations. Technical indicators suggest mixed signals, while fundamental analysis highlights its strong revenue and net profit within the Software & IT Services industry.
